definitions.text: A change of position. A manoeuvre of troops or ships. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller} A turning movement, especially of the body. A turned or twisted shape; an involution, a complex or intricate shape.
A manoeuvre of troops or ships. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
A turning movement, especially of the body.
